zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bamfield於1709年出生在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆時，她的父親John Bampfield41歲，母親Joan Thomas35歲。她和Thomas Driver至少有1個女兒。她去世於1792年1月在她的家鄉享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bamfield于1709年出生在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆时，她的父亲John Bampfield41岁，母亲Joan Thomas35岁。她和Thomas Driver至少有1个女儿。她去世于1792年1月在她的家乡享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bamfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bamfield was born in 1709, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bampfield, was 41 and her mother, Joan Thomas, was 35. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas Driver. She died in January 1792, in her hometown, at the age of 83, and was buried in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bamfield est née en 1709, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bampfield, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Thomas, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomas Driver. Elle est décédée en janvier 1792, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bamfield 1709 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bampfield 41 und ihre Mutter Joan Thomas 35. Sie hatte mit Thomas Driver mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Januar 1792 im Alter von 83 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bamfield è nata il nel 1709 nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bampfield, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Joan Thomas, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomas Driver. Morì nel gennaio 1792, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bamfieldが1709年にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで生まれた時，父John Bampfieldは41歳，母Joan Thomasは35歳であった。彼女はThomas Driverとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1792年1月に故郷で83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bamfield(이)가 1709년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bampfield(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Thomas(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Driver(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1792년 1월 그녀의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bamfield nasceu em 1709, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Bampfield, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Thomas, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Thomas Driver. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1792, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bamfield родилась в 1709 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bampfield было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Thomas, 35. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomas Driver. Она умерла январь 1792 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Bamfield nació en 1709, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Bampfield, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Thomas, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Thomas Driver. Murió en enero de 1792, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
